title: Target Sum
problem_statement: Given numbers and a target, count ways to assign + or - signs to each number to reach the target sum.

examples.explanation: Five ways to reach 3 with signs.

intuition: Transform to a subset sum problem by solving for the sum of positive-assigned numbers.

approaches.name: Subset sum with offset
approaches.description: Use DP to count subsets whose sum equals (target + total)/2 when this value is an integer.
approaches.why_not: Brute force sign assignments is O(2^n) and too slow for n=20.

interview_qa.q: How is Target Sum reduced to subset sum?
interview_qa.a: Positive numbers minus negative numbers equals target, so the sum of positives becomes (total + target)/2.
If total + target is odd or |target| > total, there is no valid assignment.
